title: Verify existing notification system implementation
description: Verify that all components of the notification system are already implemented: model in src/models/notification.ts, service in src/services/notifications.ts, API routes in src/app/api/notifications/, helpers in src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts, plus tests. Then confirm @kody decompose correctly identifies this as a complex task (complexity_score >= 4, decomposable: true) and generates 2+ parallel sub-tasks with worktrees.
